options.text: Cases cannot be created from any of the social channels

options.text: No specific task prefix just existing TASK prefix

options.text: No escalation approval flow is configured
The parent account of the account to be escalated is not active
The customer service agent is not assigned with the escalation requester role

options.text: Whitelist all other groups from the Knowledge Base

questions.question: In case management, Parent Child Synchronization allows for which of the following:

options.text: Enabling the Customer Service agent to create cases so that all the children cases can be managed bymanaging the parent case
Parent cases to automatically generate child cases when all fields are filled out thus synchronized auto- population
Child cases to be separated from Parent cases and will not be synchronized automatically
Synchronization of all child cases as well as children of child cases on all levels

options.text: A partner will own the relationship with their customer
A partner and a third party are the same in ServiceNow’s CSM application

options.text: A step-by-step methodology for creating and solving different case types
A detailed check list for customer service teams
A multi-step process consisting of a series of questions answers, and guidance

questions.question: The ServiceNow add-in for Microsoft Outlook enables you to manage workflows such ascreating and updating contacts and cases from within Microsoft Outlook. How could thisfeature positively affect customer experience?

options.text: As email is being used fewer agents would be required to create cases so service costs would go down
It is easier to report on data in emails which means managers would be better placed to trackperformance
It can lead to taster resolution of customer issues and faster response to customer inquiries
It would guarantee less wait time for customers who chose to call the customer service center

questions.question: In ServiceNow’s CSM Application, what is an interaction?

options.text: Any configuration item that has been made accessible to customers
A record that a Customer Service Agent uses to identify and resolve a question or an issue for anexternal customer
A binding agreement between two parties
A request for assistance made through a chat, phone call, or walk-up

options.text: Can research questions issues, or problems, and create view and edit cases for only their own accounts

Can view assets belonging to their account
